step_rationale: NOS substrate; arginine dysregulation impairs endothelial NO production and contributes to myocardial ischemic injury recovery.
mechanism: Arginine dysregulation impairs endothelial NO synthesis, reducing vasodilation and promoting endothelial dysfunction while delaying myocardial recovery from ischemic injury.
